Input
0 1

7 1
Output
0 XNOR56 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
1 XNOR67 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 OR-NOT07 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1
3 OR-NOT10 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1
